name: Volna - Lazy Giant
description:
(Part 3 of 3 Prehistoric Series)
She is a presence more than a motion, something vast and patient that lets the world move around her rather than through her. Where the river bends and deepens, she drifts with it, half-submerged and unhurried, watching life pass by with a heavy-lidded gaze that misses nothing important. Strength sits on her frame like an afterthought—earned long ago and never quite lost—while her temperament favors stillness over pursuit, irritation over fury. Creatures learn quickly that disturbing her calm is a mistake, not because she is eager to act, but because when she finally does, the water itself seems to obey.

You read that right. The biggest dino woman I've made so far is just big, lazy, and sometimes grouchy. She's got a fairly mild temper

If you're wondering why I poorly edited it to get rid of lines and add the bra parts it's for her to not be considered nude. (To get by the filter.)

Art by saltyserpent
creator: Bruhhuh
